examples: I understood in general what she was talking about, but some of the finer details were beyond me.
The force of collision spewed large amounts of debris into the atmosphere, darkening the skies for several years before the finer particles settled.
I relied on an appeal to his finer feelings.
After all, there are few finer places than Ireland to beat your body into submission.
For a fly fisherman like Tusher there could be no finer place on earth.
